post.description: Register or update an FCM token for the current user

delete.description: Delete an FCM token for the current user

get.description:
Retrieves the current session state for a room.

This endpoint exposes the SessionState schema and its enums (SessionStatus, TotemStatus)
in the OpenAPI documentation for client-side usage.

post.description: All state mutations go through this endpoint. The server validates the transition, persists it, and broadcasts the new state to LiveKit.

get.description: Returns the current state snapshot. Used by clients on reconnect or as a fallback poll when LiveKit data messages may have been missed.

post.description: Returns a LiveKit access token. Creates the Room if needed.
Keeper mutes a specific participant's audio.
Emits a remove event to a specific participant

Request a PIN code to be sent via email.
This endpoint handles both new and existing users.
Validate PIN and issue token pair.
Refresh access token using a valid refresh token.
Logout by invalidating a refresh token.

RoomState.description:
The canonical state snapshot. This is what gets:
- returned from both endpoints
- published to LiveKit room metadata
- built from the Room model

Clients should treat this as the single type they deserialize everywhere.
User references are slugs (short unique public IDs), not internal IDs.
RoomState.title: RoomState

ErrorCode.description:
Machine-readable error codes. Clients switch on these, not on messages.
Add new codes here as needed — the OpenAPI spec will update automatically.
ErrorCode.title: ErrorCode

RoomErrorResponse.description:
Structured error. Clients switch on `code`, display `message`.
`detail` is optional extra context for debugging.
RoomErrorResponse.title: RoomErrorResponse

BanParticipantEvent.description: Keeper permanently bans a participant, removing them from the talking order.
BanParticipantEvent.title: BanParticipantEvent

EventRequest.description:
POST body. Includes the event and the client's last-seen version
for optimistic concurrency control.
EventRequest.title: EventRequest

ForcePassStickEvent.description:
Keeper forces the current speaker to pass the stick.
The next speaker won't have a chance to accept — the stick will be passed immediately.
ForcePassStickEvent.title: ForcePassStickEvent

UnbanParticipantEvent.description: Keeper lifts a ban, allowing the participant to rejoin.
UnbanParticipantEvent.title: UnbanParticipantEvent

JoinResponse.description: Token for connecting to a LiveKit room.
JoinResponse.title: JoinResponse
